overview.title: Dashboard
overview.apiUnreachableHint: Data will refresh automatically after connectivity recovers.
overview.description: Aggregates bootstrap snapshot, usage, MCP, and Skills contracts to restore the dashboard module entry.

mcp.title: MCP Console
mcp.description: Manage Codex MCP entries directly in the app.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this MCP server?
mcp.pathCopiedDesc: The MCP config file path was copied to the clipboard.

skills.title: Skills Management
skills.description: Import, remove, backup and restore local Codex skills directly in the app.
skills.pathCopiedDesc: The path text was copied to the clipboard.
skills.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this skill? A backup will be created automatically.
skills.confirmDeleteBackup: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.description: Manage Codex global custom instructions through ~/.codex/AGENTS.md without touching project-level AGENTS rules.
customInstructions.templatesDescription: Built-in templates are available now and admin-managed templates can be attached later.
customInstructions.currentDescription: Only the the app managed block is shown here. Other handwritten global rules are preserved.
customInstructions.editorDescription: Edit on top of a template, then apply only to the the app managed block in the global AGENTS file.
customInstructions.editorPlaceholder: Edit the content that will be written into the managed global custom-instructions block
customInstructions.historyDescription: Recent local apply records are kept here so you can roll back quickly.
customInstructions.globalScopeHint: Only manages the the app block inside global ~/.codex/AGENTS.md
customInstructions.noManagedContent: There is no the app managed block yet.
customInstructions.clearedManagedContent: This action will clear the the app managed block.
customInstructions.clearConfirmDescription: This only removes the the app managed block from ~/.codex/AGENTS.md and preserves any other global rules you wrote yourself.
customInstructions.templatesLoadFailed: Failed to load remote templates. Falling back to built-in templates.
customInstructions.loadFailedDesc: Try again later, or check your network and refresh the page.
customInstructions.previewDescription: This only updates the the app managed block inside ~/.codex/AGENTS.md. It does not touch project code or project-level AGENTS files.
customInstructions.applySuccessDesc: The the app managed block was written to ~/.codex/AGENTS.md.
customInstructions.clearSuccessDesc: The the app managed block was removed from the global AGENTS file.
customInstructions.rollbackSuccess: Rolled back to the selected history
customInstructions.rollbackSuccessDesc: The selected history version replaced the current the app managed block.
customInstructions.rollbackFailed: Failed to roll back custom instructions

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Diagnose system status, clean redundant data, rebuild registry, and recover local runtime issues.
maintenance.diagnoseDesc: Detect OS, architecture, version and registered account count to verify runtime environment.
maintenance.cleanDesc: Remove redundant auth backups, registry backups and stale snapshot entries to free disk space.
maintenance.rebuildDesc: Scan local snapshot files to regenerate registry, fixing corruption or data inconsistency.
maintenance.restartCodexDesc: Terminate and restart the local Codex process to apply config changes or recover from errors.
maintenance.restartConfirmDesc: This will terminate the current Codex process and restart it. Any ongoing operations may be interrupted.
maintenance.cleanResult: Removed: {{authBackups}} auth backups, {{registryBackups}} registry backups, {{staleEntries}} stale entries
maintenance.routerDiagnosticsDesc: Invoke the dumped run_codex_router_diagnostics command and keep the result in the maintenance owner.
maintenance.fixRouterAllDesc: Invoke the dumped fix_codex_router_issue command with itemId all.
maintenance.systemInfoDesc: Invokes the dumped get_system_info command and only displays basic runtime fields returned by the backend.
maintenance.openPathDesc: open_path requires a real path parameter; this slice has not restored a path source, so only a disabled boundary is exposed.
maintenance.forceKillCodexDesc: Invoke the dumped force_kill_codex command to terminate local Codex processes.
maintenance.resetCodexConfigDesc: Invoke the dumped reset_codex_config command to reset local Codex configuration.
maintenance.imageCompatDesc: Read and write the dumped get_image_compat and set_image_compat commands.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize the app appearance, behavior preferences and auto-switch strategy.
settings.apiProxyDesc: Only applies to Codex configuration and status refresh requests.
settings.apiProxyDialogDesc: Configure a dedicated proxy for the app network requests.
settings.apiProxySavedDesc: Remote requests for quota and account metadata will use the new proxy route.
settings.refreshIntervalSaveFailedDesc: Kept the current background setting. Please try again later.
settings.thresholdSavedDesc: Auto-switch is off; only the threshold values were updated.
settings.hotspotEnabledDesc: The notch area shows quota percentage; click to return to the main window.
settings.hotspotDisabledDesc: Notch quota display is turned off.
settings.upToDateDesc: You are already on the latest version. No update is needed.
settings.updateCheckFailedDesc: Check your network connection or try again later.
settings.apiProxyDetectFailed: No working proxy address was detected. Please check your VPN or proxy client and enter the correct address manually.
settings.apiProxyTestReachableDirect: Connected to ChatGPT service via direct connection.
settings.apiProxyTestReachableManual: Connected to ChatGPT service via the configured proxy.
settings.apiProxyTestInvalidConfig: The proxy configuration is invalid. Check the proxy URL and scheme.
settings.apiProxyTestClientBuildFailed: Failed to create the proxy client. Check the current proxy settings.
settings.apiProxyTestNetworkFailed: Proxy test failed. Check whether the local proxy is running and whether the network is reachable.
settings.apiProxyTestFailed: Proxy test failed. Please try again later.
settings.thresholdDialogDesc: When the current account's quota percentage drops below the threshold, the app will prompt you to switch to the account with the most remaining quota and restart Codex.
settings.accentColorDesc: Customize the primary color for buttons, selections and highlights.
settings.heatmapColorDesc: Customize the primary color for heatmaps and charts in the analytics panel.
settings.refreshIntervalDesc: This setting controls only the quota API (wham/usage) auto-refresh cadence.
settings.updateRestartDesc: Requires runtime evidence that an update is installed, so this slice exposes only the boundary entry.
settings.hotspotDesc: Show real-time 5-hour and weekly quota percentages at the notch area. Click to return to the main window.
settings.hotspotNotSupported: Only available on Macs with a notch display. This device is not compatible.
settings.imageCompatDesc: Restored IPC boundary for toggling backend image compatibility.
settings.autoSwitchDesc: Switch available accounts according to quota thresholds.
settings.autoSwitchEnabledDesc: The background flow checks thresholds and switches accounts.
settings.autoSwitchDisabledDesc: The background flow will not switch accounts automatically.

common.toastErrorGenericDesc: Check your network and proxy status, then try again.
common.toastCopiedDesc: Content was copied to the clipboard. You can paste it now.
common.rootErrorDescription: The application root failed to render. Retry or reopen the window.

update.title: Update Available
update.installBlocked: the app cannot install updates from the current location. Reopen it from the real installed app path and try again.
update.installBlockedReadOnlyLocation: the app is currently running from a read-only location, so self-update cannot replace the app bundle. Move the app to Applications or a real local folder, reopen it from that path, then try again.
update.installBlockedAppTranslocation: the app is currently running from macOS App Translocation in a read-only mount, so self-update cannot write the app bundle. Move the app to Applications or a real local folder, reopen it from that path, then try again.
update.installPromptDesc: the app is currently running from a temporary macOS read-only location, so future updates will fail. Move the app into Applications, then reopen it from the real installed app path.

pending.title: {{module}} pending completion
pending.description: This module does not have enough evidence yet, so no business list, action, or data state is fabricated.

accounts.description: Restores the account module entry from the 1.0.9 IPC contract. Import, switch, export, and monitor actions are owned by module query and mutation owners.
accounts.empty: No account entries were found in the current evidence payload
accounts.addAccountSessionFailedDesc: Failed to import the session account. Check the session JSON and try again.
accounts.actionsDesc: These actions come from the 1.0.9 frontend IPC contract. The panel only collects parameters; mutations and cache writes stay owned by the accounts module.
accounts.accountKeyPlaceholder: Enter the account key to switch to
accounts.accountKeysPlaceholder: Separate account keys with spaces, newlines, or commas
accounts.importFilePlaceholder: Enter an account backup file path
accounts.exportTargetPlaceholder: Enter the account backup export path
accounts.addAccountSessionDesc: Import session JSON through the account module mutation owner following the 1.0.9 frontend flow.
accounts.addAccountSessionStep1Desc: Confirm the target account is signed in in the browser.
accounts.addAccountSessionStep2Desc: Open the session endpoint and copy the returned JSON.
accounts.addAccountSessionStep3Desc: Paste the complete session JSON into the input.
accounts.addAccountSessionRisk: Session JSON is sensitive data and is only sent through the local backend import flow.
accounts.confirmRemove: Remove {{email}}? This action is sent through the account module mutation owner.
accounts.removeActiveDisabled: The active account cannot be removed directly
accounts.selectHint: Select an account on the left to view details
accounts.switchConfirmDesc: Switch to {{email}} and restart the app?

sessions.description: Restores the sessions module entry from session IPC and analytics contracts. The session list is owned by the module query owner.
sessions.empty: No session entries were found in the current evidence payload
sessions.emptyAnalytics: No session analytics series was found in the current evidence payload
sessions.deleteLagHint: The list refresh waits for the backend authoritative result.
sessions.treeDescription: Sessions grouped by project and parent-child thread relation.

analytics.description: Restores the analytics module entry from usage, session, token, tool, and change analytics IPC contracts.
analytics.quotaAccountKeyPlaceholder: Enter an account key to load quota history
analytics.quotaAccountKeyRequired: Enter an account key to load quota history
analytics.emptySeries: No series data was found in the current evidence payload

relay.description: Restores the relay module entry from relay state, proxy status, diagnostics, and config action IPC contracts.
relay.emptyProviders: No providers were found in the current evidence payload
relay.proxyContract: Proxy status only displays structured capability results returned by the backend; components do not interpret platform state machines.

codexRouter.codexRunningDescription: Close the related process before changing router settings.
codexRouter.migrationPendingHint: A migration is pending. Complete it before retrying.
codexRouter.warnUserProfileExists: An existing user profile was detected. Confirm it will not be overwritten before continuing.

plugins.description: Restores the plugins module entry from runtime extension IPC contracts. Plugin list and config actions are owned by the module owner.
plugins.empty: No plugins were found in the current evidence payload

daemonAutoswitch.description: Restores the daemon autoswitch module entry from bootstrap, pending auto-switch, and daemon runner IPC contracts.

trayShell.description: Restores the tray shell module entry from notification client and window focus IPC contracts.

voice.description: Restores the voice module entry from voice workspace, runtime status, and permission IPC contracts.
voice.emptyTemplates: No voice templates were found in the current evidence payload
voice.emptyVocabulary: No voice vocabulary was found in the current evidence payload
voice.emptyHistory: No voice history was found in the current evidence payload
voice.injectPlaceholder: Enter text to inject into the foreground target

feedback.errorDesc: Feedback could not be sent. Try again later.
feedback.networkErrorDesc: Cannot reach the feedback service. Check the network and retry.
feedback.successDesc: Thanks. The feedback record has been submitted.

mysteryCode.successDesc: The grant was written to local state.
mysteryCode.errorNetwork: Network error. The mystery code cannot be verified.
mysteryCode.toastErrorHint: Try again later or check the input.
